mapper.select: SELECT id, form_code, form_name, table_name, dictionary_json, raw_text, is_pinned, create_time, update_time FROM data_dictionary ORDER BY is_pinned DESC, update_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO data_dictionary (form_code, form_name, table_name, dictionary_json, raw_text, is_pinned, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{formCode}, #{formName}, #{tableName}, #{dictionaryJson}, #{rawText}, 0, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE data_dictionary SET form_name = #{formName}, table_name = #{tableName}, dictionary_json = #{dictionaryJson}, raw_text = #{rawText}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE form_code = #{formCode}
UPDATE data_dictionary SET is_pinned = #{pinned} WHERE form_code = #{formCode}
mapper.select: SELECT id, form_code, form_name, table_name, dictionary_json, raw_text, is_pinned, create_time, update_time FROM data_dictionary WHERE form_code LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR form_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR table_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY is_pinned DESC, update_time DESC
